title: ProjectNexusDevelopment
description: a small and lightweight modpack with some building mods to build a server. No quests are provided
body: # Welcome to Project Nexus (name pending) Project nexus is an in-development server (not public yet), aiming to create a lightweight, medieval fantasy modpack. ** ** This modpack is currently in active development, I don't recommend using this modpack on your own server as it is meant for a specific server and doesnt feature any unique mobs or quests. This modpack only adds a few items and building blocks. More info will be added to the description as we continue building the server ** ** [ ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/projectnexus) [ ](https://modrinth.com/modpack/projectnexusdevelopment)
